title: Debug SDTM CM domain program: Concomitant Medications errors

inputs.prompt: The following SAS program creates the SDTM CM domain but has 3 bugs: (1) CMDECOD is populated from the raw verbatim term (CMTRT) instead of standard medication dictionary coding, (2) CMROUTE uses non-standard lowercase route codes (e.g., 'oral') instead of CDISC controlled terminology ('ORAL'), (3) CMSTDTC date conversion uses is8601dt. (datetime) instead of is8601da. (date-only). Fix all bugs.
